# Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Compatibility and safety

Describe any CLI, manifest, filesystem, installer, platform, or Bash 3.2 impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `/bin/bash scripts/check.sh`
- [ ] `/bin/bash tests/run.sh`
- [ ] Documentation updated when a public contract changed
- [ ] No credentials, live config, backups, archives, or test artifacts added
